nasb.text: But they said to Joshua, “We are your servants.” Then Joshua said to them, “Who are you and where do you come from?”

esv.text: They said to Joshua, “We are your servants.” And Joshua said to them, “Who are you? And where do you come from?”

cnv.text: 他們對約書亞說：“我們是你的僕人。”約書亞問他們：“你們是甚麼人？是從哪裡來的？”

ccb.text: 他们对约书亚说：“我们是你的奴仆。”约书亚说：“你们是什么人？从哪里来？”
